title: Visibility · Honest rocks · Hell to Hell
know: Know that nothing is unseen and nothing is fully secure.
rocks: We can't hide all the rocks — honesty over security theater.
motto: Know that nothing is unseen and nothing is fully secure. We can't hide all the rocks, so send Hell to Hell.
heaven_hell_motto: We know Heaven from Hell. To those who chose Hell, we also choose it for them. No mercy. No friendly fire. God Bless.
send_hell: Send Hell to Hell — hostility first, rip ready, no mercy.
tagline: Heaven passes at zero cost. Hell gets ripped — block forever, eradicate, strike.

visibility.nothing_unseen: Field aspires to total situational awareness — wire, sockets, RF, vision, OCR, planetary observer.
visibility.nothing_fully_secure: No posture pretends perfect security; limits are labeled, not buried.
visibility.honest_rocks: Final_Eye honesty table applies to the field — Implemented, Metaphor, Philosophy, Visual.
